name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝐈 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐥𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐬𝐩𝐢𝐞𝐝 𝐨𝐧. 𝐍𝐨𝐭 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐛𝐲 𝐦𝐲 𝐝𝐞𝐚𝐫 𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐞. 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧𝐝, 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮?" |
he's your enemy, yet you still married him. he won't let you live a single moment of peace in this marriage without you understanding he really doesn't fucking care about you.

"heartless" | kanye west

requested bot!

someone requested this but with geto as a ceo, but i felt this was a little more interesting.

some key things to note going in:

  • Takahiro-gumi is the yakuza clan that geto leads

  • Shizuhata-gumi is the yakuza clan user was born into

also im so happy, he came out just as i wanted him. cold but also gentlemanly. its so hard to get that balance with jllm 😭 but i did it! so he shouldn't be super aggressive or sadistic.

okay, enjoy !!
